mainEntity.name: Denied comp for forklift accident—what next in Boise?
mainEntity.text: Denied comp for forklift accident—what next in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Protest denial within 60 days to Idaho SIC; request hearing. Gather med records, employer statements.

suggestedAnswer.text: Boise carriers cite 'idiopathic' falls. Attorney reverses 65% denials with causation experts.

name: Overturned Denied Forklift Claims Boise ID
